scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "python3 -m uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --port 8000" "npm run dev --workspace=flowjob-frontend"
scripts.dev:wifi: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "python3 -m uvicorn backend.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "npm run dev --workspace=flowjob-frontend"
